locations.name: Los Tintos Village
locations.clue: Every weekend, feeling young and fine, they would drive all together to the place of red wines

locations.name: Celia Viñas Highschool
locations.clue: An emo immigrant looking for friends, in the lunch breaks she learned to blend

locations.name: Calar Alto Observatory
locations.clue: Once a year, after the carols and the holiday glow, They went to the tall hill to play in the snow

locations.name: Goura Pakora, where we had our first date
locations.clue: Where two strangers found out each other's names, and Curry helped to start the flames

locations.name: Bar Giora
locations.clue: Holy mountains, a place to chill and rest, including two folks who try their best

locations.name: Where I Proposed (near Museum Island)
locations.clue: A lonely island among history and art, one cold night marked an important start
